basics.name: Aryan Sharma
basics.title: CS + Statistics @ University of Maryland, College Park
basics.summary: Freshman at The University of Maryland, College Park currently pursuing a degree in Computer Science and a minor in Statistics, with a focus in Quantitative Analysis and Low-Level Systems. I have hands-on experience in the AI sector, where I engineered data pipelines to process large-scale datasets for predictive modeling. Currently, I am taking courses in Advanced Linear Algebra, Discrete Mathematics, Object-Oriented Programming, and C++ systems programming. I am actively seeking internship opportunities in Quantitative Finance or Software Engineering where I can apply mathematical rigor to complex engineering problems.

bullets: Learning Full Stack Web Development using HTML, CSS, React, Javascript and Git

Engineered automated data pipelines using Python (Pandas, NumPy, Matplotlib) and KNIME to process and analyze 50,000+ gene-drug relationships from OpenTargets and DisGenet databases for obesity therapeutic research

Developed algorithms to filter massive datasets and identify unique Gene-Disease Associations (GDA), implementing custom scoring mechanisms to rank 500+ gene-obesity combinations based on correlation strength

Built predictive models to discover novel drug-target relationships, achieving 85%+ correlation accuracy between independent database scores through comparative analysis and relative scoring methodologies

Optimized data workflows reducing processing time by 40% through efficient command-line operations and Python automation, enabling identification of 20+ novel therapeutic targets for pharmaceutical development

projects.title: Full-Stack Enterprise Inventory Platform
bullets: Reduced manual inventory tracking time by 30% for over 1000+ stock units by engineering a full-stack solution that integrates a Java Spring Boot backend with a Python Streamlit analytics dashboard.

Achieved sub-100ms data synchronization latency across the stack by designing a RESTful API architecture that handles 100% of real-time CRUD (Create, Read, Update, and Delete) operations without data loss.
Slashed environment setup time by 90% (from 1 hour to <5 minutes) by containerizing the PostgreSQL database using Docker, ensuring 100% runtime consistency across development stages.

education.degree: Bachelor of Science in Computer Science; Minor in Statistics
bullets: Relevant Coursework: Applications of Linear Algebra, Object-Oriented Programming, Discrete Structures, Advanced Linear Algebra, Discrete Mathematics, C++ systems programming
